query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION) FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'baseline_schedules';
